extract: Nincada (Japanese: ツチニン Tutinin) is a dual-type Bug/Ground Pokémon introduced in Generation III. It evolves into Ninjask starting at level 20 and, upon Evolution, Shedinja, if the player has an empty slot in their party and an extra Poké Ball on hand. (Specifics may differ in past games. Refer to Game data→Evolution data for these details.)
